meaning: n.文件夹,折叠器,折叠机,折叠式印刷品
examples: The folder was two inches thick.
Lance pulled a bundle of papers out of a folder.
He opened his attaché case, removed a folder, then closed it again.
Cooperman keeps a bulging manila folder of congratulatory notes in his office at Omega.
Repositioning is performed by tapping and dragging, while dropping one on another creates a folder.
